wordplay_note: A man named Laws who is lawless in his subjective world
card_description: Laws (Arthur) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Eye in the Sky*. One of the bevatron accident survivors. Name note: A man named Laws who is lawless in his subjective world. The irony of names — Laws creates a lawless reality. First appears in *Eye in the Sky*.

reference.brief: One of the bevatron accident survivors
reference.significance: The irony of names — Laws creates a lawless reality
